name: Dragunity Knight - Gormfaobhar
name_jp: ドラグニティナイト－ゴルムファバル
desc:
1 "Dragunity" Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
When this card is Synchro Summoned: You can target 1 "Dragunity" Tuner in your GY; equip it to this card. (Quick Effect): You can send 1 Equip Card you control that is equipped to this card to the GY, then target up to 2 cards in your opponent's GY; banish them. You can only use each effect of "Dragunity Knight - Gormfaobhar" once per turn.
mnst_eff:
1 "Dragunity" Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
When this card is Synchro Summoned: You can target 1 "Dragunity" Tuner in your GY; equip it to this card. (Quick Effect): You can send 1 Equip Card you control that is equipped to this card to the GY, then target up to 2 cards in your opponent's GY; banish them. You can only use each effect of "Dragunity Knight - Gormfaobhar" once per turn.

When this card is Synchro Summoned: You can target 1 "Dragunity" Tuner in your GY; equip it to this card. You can only use each effect of "Dragunity Knight - Gormfaobhar" once per turn.

action: Equips monsters from the player's Graveyard to itself
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
summoning: Requires archetype specific Tuner Synchro Materials
Does not require specific non-Tuner Synchro Materials
